title: Subtitles+
description: Replaces Minecraft’s subtitles with a customizable system that adds color‑coded sounds, sound icons, background options, and a drag‑and‑resize on‑screen editor.
body:
Subtitles+

***Take control of your subtitles. Move, scale, and color-code every sound with added category icons and a modern UI.*** ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0364a4c4633d389f8bbacd8bff94c688ce077731.png) ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65dfe7f6217f1ca5bffa688dfecaa324cb2cf02_0.webp) ## 🎨 Key Features ### 📦 Customizable Subtitle Box * **Drag** to reposition anywhere on screen. * **Resize** with a corner handle. * Adjustable **scale** (0.5x to 3.0x). * **Preview Mode** — cycle between OFF, Outline only, and Full preview. * **Auto Flip** — switches UP/DOWN automatically when dragged to a corner (requires Guides ON). ### ⚙️ Smart Rendering Engine * **Fully replaces vanilla subtitle drawing.** * Smooth **slide-in animations**. * **Flexible Layout:** Choose whether the list expands upwards or downwards. * **Subtitle Background:** Toggle between no background, modded style, or vanilla look. * **BG Opacity Slider** — control how dark the subtitle background appears. * **Subtitle Limit** — cap the number of subtitles shown at once. * **Alignment** — CENTER keeps subtitles fixed, AUTO shifts them toward the nearest screen edge. ### 🪄 Sound Customization * **Contextual Colors (Optional):** Toggle sounds being color-coded based on their type (e.g., red for hostile mobs, blue for players), including some overrides for specific sounds like lava and portals. * **Sound Icons (Optional):** Toggle specialized sound icons next to subtitles for quick visual recognition. * **Sound Blacklist** — block specific subtitles from appearing, with auto-suggestions. ### ⌨️ Config Menu * Open the menu with **F4** or toggle subtitles on/off with **H**. * Keybinds are customizable in `Options > Controls > Key Binds`. * 💡 Make sure you have (Closed Captions) turned ON in `Music & Sounds` ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65dfe7f6217f1ca5bffa688dfecaa324cb2cf02_0.webp)
🛠️ Development > Since I hadn't seen anyone fully overhaul the subtitle system before, I wanted to try to do it. > > This mod took me about a week to develop. > Having no prior experience with coding, > > I used [![Gemini](https://img.shields.io/badge/Gemini-8E75B2?style=plastic&logo=none&label=&color=8E75B2)](https://gemini.google.com/) , [![Claude](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude-D97757?style=plastic&logo=none&label=&color=D97757)](https://claude.ai/) to handle all of the actual coding based on my vision and feedback. > > I spent a lot of time experimenting and testing to understand how to make it all work together. > Because I tried to do something new with the subtitle system, there might still be some minor quirks in the logic not a 100% sure. > However, I hope this works and brings a brand new experience to the game.
![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65dfe7f6217f1ca5bffa688dfecaa324cb2cf02_0.webp) ## 🙌 Credits * **Icon Assets:** Adapted from [*Symbolic Subtitles*](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/symbolic-subtitles) by Marvisbad ![goat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd1dde30da73ada93df175fb6e9d9cd0049639e_0.webp) (CC BY 4.0).
